content: Before I start uploading anything: the records I'd actually be running this against don't live as CSV files on my desktop — IT has them in our compliance team's SharePoint workspace, and depending on the workstream they may also be in our records-management library or attached to specific Outlook items in the shared mailbox. Can we set up the workflow to read directly from those locations? It would save us the back-and-forth of manually exporting every quarter, and the second-line review process expects us to pull from the system of record rather than from local copies, for evidentiary integrity.
